name: Peppy Mini Pizza Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown and drain the ground beef.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
4. Separate dough into 10 biscuits.
5. Press or roll each biscuit into a 5-inch circle, forming a 1/4-inch rim around the outside edge.
6. Spread 2 tablespoons of sauce just along the edges of the pizza.
7. Sprinkle each pizza with a small amount of oregano.
8. Top each pizza with pepperoni, ground beef, and cheese.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes at 400°F (200°C) until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
10. Remove from the cookie sheet.
11. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 10 pizzas.
